full_description: Three blocks on the table (random colors). Use {a} to move them to the center and arrange from largest to smallest, left to right.
schema: {A} is the large block, {B} is the medium block, {C} is the small block. {a} is the single arm used to move and arrange all three.
preference: Num of words should not exceed 15. Degree of detail avg 8.
